description_long: This object is a small, tan-brown crustacean with a rounded, segmented body and a hard exoskeleton. It features a prominent cephalothorax and a slightly bulbous abdomen, with six visible legs that are jointed and curve outward from the body. Two long, slender antennae extend from the front, giving it a distinctive appearance. The surface of the exoskeleton appears smooth with a slight sheen, and the legs and antennae are more slender and slightly darker in color. No visible claws are present, and the eyes are not clearly discernible from the images.
description: A small, tan-brown crustacean with a rounded, segmented body, six jointed legs, and long antennae. Its smooth, hard exoskeleton gives it a slightly glossy appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the two long antennae extending forward and the symmetrical arrangement of the legs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the arched back, jointed legs, and the elongated body profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the rounded abdomen and the curvature of the legs extending outward.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the body segmentation and leg articulation.
